paper.title: More Than Can Be Said: A Benchmark and Framework for Pre-Question Scientific Ideation

official_release.relationship_evidence: The immutable arXiv v1 abstract metadata comment and the full paper identify https://github.com/Paradoxtcal/InciteResearch.git as the code release.
official_release.release_timing_note: The acquired head postdates arXiv v1 submission by eleven days. The seven-commit API history begins 1 hour 47 minutes after the arXiv published timestamp. Treat the acquired repository as a later mutable release, not as evidence of the exact paper-time implementation.

not_found_in_acquired_tree: human annotations or completed scoring sheets
LLM judge prompts tied to reported evaluation
scripts that reproduce the paper's TF-Bench tables
release_inventory_observation.scope_note: Absence is an acquisition-time inventory of the exact 41-blob tree at the pinned commit, not proof that these artifacts never existed elsewhere. A reviewer should verify paper-to-code correspondence and may search additional author-owned locations.

verification.withdrawal_check: The immutable arXiv v1 API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.
verification.pdf_check: pdfinfo parsed an unencrypted 19-page PDF; pdftotext produced non-empty text spanning the abstract, methods, experiments, references, appendices, full EVN prompt templates, TF-Bench dataset card, broader impacts, and license notes.
verification.release_check: The downloaded zip contains 49 members whose total uncompressed bytes equal the 41 Git blob sizes in the non-truncated recursive tree response.
